title: fix(audio): stop parseMp4Duration on elevenmusic mp3 responses
author: fisventurous

gist.headline: The $38,000 MP3
gist.blurb: Fixed a quirky math bug where reading MP3 files as MP4s accidentally priced 3-minute songs at $38,000. The music API is back to its usual, highly affordable self!
gist.summary: Resolved an issue where the audio API incorrectly parsed MP3 files as MP4s, resulting in massive, inaccurate duration estimates that triggered balance errors.
gist.impact: Users can once again generate music reliably without hitting unexpected 402 Insufficient Balance errors.
gist.visual_concept: The bee (Polly) looking shocked at a comically long receipt or giant price tag coming out of a retro boombox or MP3 player, while the Nomnom creature happily eats the massive bill to make it disappear.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny headphones, looking surprised at a comically long paper receipt printing out of a retro boombox. The round tan nomnom creature is happily eating the other end of the massive receipt. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
